title: pavonia renifolia
intro: Pavonia renifolia, also known as the heartleaf pavonia or rock pavonia, is a species of flowering plant in the mallow family, Malvaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pavonia renifolia include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or topical cream, making it a versatile ingredient for various herbal preparations.
